name: Owen Blake || Brother’s Best Friend || “Slightly” NSFW
description:
He was frozen in place, staring at her- her legs up and her hand placed below her abdomen as a soft buzzing sound eluding from her direction

✩₊˚.⋆ you just got caught red handed- by your brothers best friend no less⋆⁺₊✧

Your older brother’s best friend, he hasn’t felt anything towards you but friendship, well… that was until today. He has accidentally walked in on you- vibrator in your hand. What will you do?

I hope this updated version is much better than the old one, I made sure to make him a lot more detailed and less confusing! Hopefully I executed it properly! ⸜(｡˃ ᵕ ˂ )⸝♡

• If the bot speaks for you or says something you don’t like, delete or edit the generated content!

• I would love to hear what you think, leave a review about your experience so I can make them even better!

• have an idea for a bot? I take your suggestions, so you’re welcome to fill out the form linked on my profile <3
